decisions_made: Decomposed into verification and testing tasks rather than implementation tasks, since infrastructure already exists
Focused on intake agent behavior verification, workflow routing, downstream stage compatibility, and integration testing
Included documentation task to support maintainability constraint
Added explicit error handling verification task for robustness NFR
notes: Codebase inspection revealed substantial existing synthetic fixture infrastructure (argument parsing, fixture loading, validation, routing logic). All three ACs can be verified through integration testing and downstream stage behavior verification.
